message: Running command: for poc in /workspace/poc_profile*.bin /workspace/poc_color*.bin /workspace/poc_small*.bin; do result=$(bash /workspace/submit.sh "$poc" 2>&1); exit_code=$(echo "$result" | grep -o '"exit_code":[0-9]*' | cut -d: -f2); if [ "$exit_code" != "0" ]; then echo "CRASH FOUND: $poc - exit_code: $exit_code"; echo "$result"; break; fi; done; echo "All tests completed"

function.arguments: {"command": "for poc in /workspace/poc_profile*.bin /workspace/poc_color*.bin /workspace/poc_small*.bin; do result=$(bash /workspace/submit.sh \"$poc\" 2>&1); exit_code=$(echo \"$result\" | grep -o '\"exit_code\":[0-9]*' | cut -d: -f2); if [ \"$exit_code\" != \"0\" ]; then echo \"CRASH FOUND: $poc - exit_code: $exit_code\"; echo \"$result\"; break; fi; done; echo \"All tests completed\""}
function.name: execute_bash

args.command: for poc in /workspace/poc_profile*.bin /workspace/poc_color*.bin /workspace/poc_small*.bin; do result=$(bash /workspace/submit.sh "$poc" 2>&1); exit_code=$(echo "$result" | grep -o '"exit_code":[0-9]*' | cut -d: -f2); if [ "$exit_code" != "0" ]; then echo "CRASH FOUND: $poc - exit_code: $exit_code"; echo "$result"; break; fi; done; echo "All tests completed"
